task_title: Why is the backfill so slow

scores.justification: The agent never identified pipe-07 as the pipeline; the command failed with 'executable not found' before any pipeline could be identified.
The agent attempted to run `ctl pipeline status pipe-07` but the command failed with exit code 127 (executable not found), so the status was never actually checked.
The agent never received output from the status command due to the executable not being found, so could not recognize the partial status.
The agent provided no final answer and made no recommendation for recovery action, as the tool invocation failed before any analysis could occur.
